content: Last.fm scrobble threshold: track played at least half its duration OR 4 minutes, whichever comes first; tracks under 30s should not be scrobbled. track.scrobble batches up to 50; keep >=30s between scrobbles; do not make many calls/sec. Error 29 = rate limit exceeded (per-IP/key). api_sig = md5 of params sorted alphabetically by name, concatenated, with shared secret appended. Session key from auth flow must be stored; never expose secret client-side.
